name: claude-code-audit-stack
description: Adversarial verification and quantitative auditing primitives for Claude Code workflows. Three production-tested subagents — bot-deploy-verifier (catches silent skipped restarts), claim-auditor (catches probability-stacking and percentage-vs-percentage-points errors in reports), remote-agent-dispatcher (mechanical scp+spawn for long-running agents on remote hosts).

subagents.name: bot-deploy-verifier
subagents.description: Adversarial post-deploy verifier. Catches silent skipped restarts and accidental cascade restarts of untouched services.

subagents.name: claim-auditor
subagents.description: Quantitative report auditor. Catches probability stacking, conditional-vs-marginal confusion, percentage-vs-percentage-points mixups, and selection bias.

subagents.name: remote-agent-dispatcher
subagents.description: Mechanical scp-and-spawn for long-running Claude Code agents on remote hosts. Captures the actual claude PID, not the bash wrapper PID.

hooks.name: audit-on-report-write
hooks.description: PostToolUse hook that auto-prompts claim-auditor whenever a *.report.md file is written or edited.

examples.title: Audit a Monte Carlo simulation report
Dispatch a long-running backtest to VPS
